revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''4-1-790

The process of extracting information from an electromagnetic wave.


Note: 1 Often a non-linear conducting device is used.


Note: 2 The use of the term for the action of a mixer is deprecated.


Note: 3 Where there was no original modulating signal the use of the term Demodulation as an alternative for "detection" is deprecated.


Reference: B.S.

{{IALAFooter}}
